mistake: Created .empirica folder in empirica-playground that conflates app database with session tracking
why_wrong: Empirica CLI walks up directory tree, finds wrong .empirica, uses wrong schema. App auth/users DB should be isolated from epistemic work tracking.
prevention: App projects should store their operational DBs in app/data/ or similar, not in .empirica. Only create .empirica for actual empirica-tracked projects.
